description_long: This is a pair of low-top sneakers with a classic skate shoe silhouette, featuring a teal blue upper with black toe caps and heel panels. The shoes have white side stripes, white midsoles, and white laces, with a visible padded collar for comfort. Decorative elements include playful, hand-drawn style graphics and text in various colors on the side panels, adding a unique, customized look. The outsole is thick and likely made of rubber, providing durability and grip for urban environments. The heel features a red and white rectangular logo patch, and the interior lining is a lighter blue. The overall construction suggests a blend of synthetic leather, canvas, and rubber materials, typical for casual streetwear shoes.
description: A pair of teal and black low-top sneakers with white accents, hand-drawn graphics, and a classic skate shoe design. Features include white laces, padded collars, and a red logo patch on the heel.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the teal upper, black toe, white laces, and decorative graphics on the outer side.
description_view_1: Rear and side view highlighting the black heel panel, red and white logo patch, and teal side panels.
description_view_2: Angled view emphasizing the white laces, padded collar, and the unique graphics on the side.
description_view_3: Top-down view displaying both shoes' uppers, laces, and the full extent of the decorative side graphics.
attribute_logo: Red and white rectangular logo patch on the heel
